relatedness_reasoning: Inbound file contains customer product holdings and financial data; outbound file generates pre-approved credit offers targeting those customers. Marketing system consumes holdings data and produces credit offers for the credit department, forming a logical pipeline. Customer ID, account data, and financial metrics (balance, turnover) are shared concepts that support offer generation.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the offer; no source in inbound data.
Direct match: customer identifier from holdings array used to target offer.
Fixed enum value 'pre_approved_credit' determined by marketing campaign logic, not sourced from inbound data.
Fixed enum value 'marketing' representing the originating department; not derived from inbound data.
Fixed enum value 'credit' representing the destination department; not derived from inbound data.
Both are ISO 8601 timestamps; outbound timestamp likely generated at offer creation time, possibly derived from or aligned with inbound processing timestamp.
